summary: Core upload + share-link flow and a dedicated view route are implemented on the frontend, along with basic image validation and a warm-themed Tailwind setup. However, required generated static theme images are not present/referenced, and backend not-found handling and ID generation do not meet the acceptance criteria (trap + non-unique ID). Some extra features (II integration, list-all API, caffeine.ai footer) appear beyond the request.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend must return a clear not-found result for missing IDs (that the frontend can handle gracefully), and provide unique public IDs per upload.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend `getApologyLetter` traps on missing IDs instead of returning a not-found result, and `uploadApologyLetter` uses `name` as the ID (not guaranteed unique and caller-controlled), which does not satisfy unique public ID creation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add generated static images (apology-illustration.dim_1200x400.png, apology-logo.dim_256x256.png) under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them directly in the upload page header.
missing_requirements.reason: No files under `frontend/public/assets/generated` are shown in the diff summary, and no direct references to those asset paths are visible in the added frontend pages/components.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity integration/provider and actor-selection logic based on authentication state.
hallucinated_features.reason: The request explicitly says Internet Identity is allowed but not required; implementing II hooks/provider is additional scope not requested by any REQ.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend method to list all apology letters (`getAllApologyLetters`).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 only asks for create/store and retrieve-by-ID; listing all uploads is not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Branded footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement requests external branding/attribution; this is extra UI content.
